name: HWR_EHW_SOURCES_VL
query: SELECT SB.SOURCE_ID ,LPVL_TYPE.LOOKUP_CODE AS TYPE ,LPVL_STATUS.LOOKUP_CODE AS STATUS ,SB.DEVICE ,SB.VENDOR ,SB.DESCRIPTION ,SB.DATA_SRC_CONFIG ,STL.DEVICE_NAME ,STL.VENDOR_NAME ,SB.AUTHORIZATION_URL ,SB.ADMINISTRATION_URL ,SB.LOCAL_SOURCE_ID FROM HWR_EHW_SOURCES_B SB, HWR_EHW_SOURCES_TL STL, HWR_LOOKUP_VL LPVL_TYPE, HWR_LOOKUP_VL LPVL_STATUS WHERE SB.SOURCE_ID = STL.SOURCE_ID (+) AND SB.TYPE_ID = LPVL_TYPE.LOOKUP_ID AND SB.STATUS_ID = LPVL_STATUS.LOOKUP_ID AND STL.LANGUAGE (+) = USERENV('LANG')
